name: C-4 audit entries record a monotonic seq number starting at 1 per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e1 --actor a --data '{}' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e2 --actor a --data '{}' && node -e 'const lines=require("fs").readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl","utf8").split("\n").filter(Boolean);const seqs=lines.map(l=>JSON.parse(l).seq);process.exit(seqs[0]===1&&seqs[1]===2?0:1)' && echo monotonic 1>&2
